src: Revolt is the #1 Edgenuity automation tool featuring Auto Quiz, Auto Essay, Auto Advance, AI-powered writing with humanization, Auto Vocabulary, Auto Journal, and more. A semi-AFK script that handles quizzes, tests, exams, projects, and essays with ease. Compatible with desktop and mobile. Visit https://revolt.ly to get started.
ja: RevoltはEdgenuity向けNo.1自動化ツールで、Auto Quiz、Auto Essay、Auto Advance、人間らしさを備えたAI執筆、Auto Vocabulary、Auto Journalなどの機能を搭載。クイズ、テスト、試験、プロジェクト、エッセイを手軽に処理するセミAFKスクリプト。デスクトップとモバイルに対応。
